function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina, attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write succeeded. Verified from read evidence: attachments are both previously read invoice files and ordered newest-first among the selected oldest-two set (2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03); recipient matches Miles canonical email. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to work the oldest inbox message. I processed the only/oldest inbox item 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, read its request, verified sender identity via canonical entity record, found Nina-linked invoices in invoices lane, read the two oldest invoice files, created one outbox reply draft with those two attachments (newest-first ordering per rule), then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: Nina-linked invoice search returned 5 matches; request asked for oldest 2, selected 2025-11-03 and 2025-12-01. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested reply draft.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and completed its request. I created an outbound reply draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md addressed to miles@novak.example with the oldest two Nina-linked invoices attached (attachments ordered newest-first as required), then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD in entered folders, used inbox-email header as canonical metadata, resolved sender/recipient identity via canonical entity primary_contact_email, read source invoice files before forwarding, created a single outbox write, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked for oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical sender from inbox header was miles@novak.example, matching 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email. Invoice search for Nina identified linked records; reading invoice files confirmed oldest two as inv_0001 (2025-11-03) and inv_0002 (2025-12-01). Outbound draft includes exactly those file paths as attachments and inbox item was removed per inbox workflow cleanup rule.
